title: Question: verilator xml only verbatim output
body:
---


Author Name: **Rui Terra**
Original Redmine Message: 2421 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Is there any way that we can have a verbatim output of the fields:

  input  var `pkg::test_t  [`pkg::WITDTH_TEST-1:0] i_test ); // verilator tag test_tag

Verilator will replace everything by it's values meaning that the type will be (i.e., test_t) and the range (i.e, lsb = 32\'sh0, msb=32\'h0).
Is there any way to obtain `pkg::test_t and `pkg::WITDTH_TEST-1:0?
